title: TemplateSelection
description: The ONLY thing the model is allowed to produce. It picks a template_id from the fixed grammar and maps manifest fields/actions into that template's slots. It never emits markup, CSS, or free-form layout. Any response that fails to validate against this schema is rejected and retried, never rendered.

template_id.description: Must be one of the template_id values from templates.json, and must be listed under device_class_defaults for the target device_class.

slot_mapping.description: Keys must exactly match the chosen template's declared slots. Values are field names or action_ids drawn from the manifest — never invented strings, never raw content.

rationale.description: One sentence, for logging/audit only. Never shown to end user as-is.
